title: Asset management is now available in monday.com
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
Thank you so much for all the feedback and ideas you’ve shared since the Inventory app launched earlier this year. For anyone new here, Inventory helps you keep track of your stock levels, alerts you when i…

posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

Thank you so much for all the feedback and ideas you’ve shared since the Inventory app launched earlier this year. For anyone new here, Inventory helps you keep track of your stock levels, alerts you when items are running low, and helps you manage warehouse space effectively.

One of the most requested features this year has been the ability to track items using serial numbers or unique IDs for more detailed asset management. That feature is now live in the Inventory app and can be run easily in monday Work Management.

If you were among those who requested it, we’d really appreciate it if you could try it out and share your thoughts. And if this is new to you, feel free to explore it as well — your feedback is always valuable and helps shape what we build next.

posts.author: mcasiraghi (Marcos)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Sari, thanks for sharing. Where can I find the inventory app so that I can try it out? Thanks!

posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mcasiraghi - you can check it out here: Inventory - monday.com Marketplace

Happy to hear your feedback or schedule a demo if relevant.

Good luck!
